Uses of Interface
com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.spec.HttpClient

  • Packages that use HttpClient 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.client.builder
    Provides classes for building GeminiClient instances.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.client.imp
    Provides implementations for the GeminiClient interface.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.client.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for the Gemini client.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.factory
    Provides classes for building HttpClient instances.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.impl
    Provides implementations for the HttpClient interface.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for the HTTP client.

    • Uses of HttpClient in com.enovka.gemini4j.client.builder

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.client.builder with parameters of type HttpClient 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      GeminiClientBuilder GeminiClientBuilder.withHttpClient​(HttpClient httpClient)
      Sets the HTTP client to use for communication with the Gemini API.

    • Uses of HttpClient in com.enovka.gemini4j.client.imp

      Constructors in com.enovka.gemini4j.client.imp with parameters of type HttpClient 
      Constructor Description
      GeminiClientImp​(String apiKey, String model, HttpClient httpClient, String baseUrl, JsonService jsonService)
      Constructs a new AbstractGeminiClient with the required API key, model, HTTP client, base URL, and JSON service.

      The HTTP client to use for communication with the Gemini API.

      The HTTP client to use for communication with the Gemini API.

      Returns the HTTP client used for communication with the Gemini API.

      HttpClient HttpClientBuilder.build()
      Creates a new HttpClient instance based on the builder configuration.

      Returns a custom HttpClient instance.

      Classes in com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.impl that implement HttpClient 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  CustomHttpClient
      Custom HTTP client implementation that wraps a user-provided HttpClient.
      class  DefaultHttpClient
      Default implementation of the HttpClient interface using Apache HttpClient.
      Constructors in com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.impl with parameters of type HttpClient 
      Constructor Description
      CustomHttpClient​(HttpClient customClient)
      Constructs a new CustomHttpClient with the provided custom client.

      Classes in com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.spec that implement HttpClient

      class  AbstractHttpClient
      Abstract base class for HTTP client implementations, providing common functionality.
